name: brand-asset
description: Logos, banners, icons, design system elements, brand collateral
usage_hint: Use for core brand materials — logos, icons, banners, design system elements, brand collateral. These are foundational assets that other content is built on. Not for social graphics or ad creatives.

criteria.name: brand-consistency
criteria.description: Brand assets are the canonical reference; they must embody the brand system

criteria.name: visual-hierarchy
criteria.description: Foundational brand assets must communicate the visual priority system

criteria.name: visual-impact
criteria.description: Brand assets must make a strong first impression across all contexts

criteria.name: accessibility-inclusivity
criteria.description: Brand assets must be accessible and usable across diverse audiences
